The '''Tlönians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Spider/Legends|arachnoids]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tlön]] in the [[Tlönia system/Legends|Tlönia system]]. They were known for their [[Poison/Legends|poison]]-sacs and habit of preying on [[Starship/Legends|starships]] imprudent enough to cross their frontier. By the [[6100s BBY]], they had been [[Speciecide|exterminated]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Crusaders|Crusaders]].<ref name="TEGW" /> Prior to their extinction, the Tlönians crafted a [[Tlönian escutcheon|particular type]] of [[Shield (physical armor)/Legends|shield]]. By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], one of those Tlönian shields ended up in the possession of a [[Cloning/Legends|genetic decoy]] of the terrorist [[Zeta Magnus]].<ref name="Skyewalkers">''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]''</ref>
